title: SEC4: send_whisper not exposed in NieClient public API
description: api.rs: NieClient exposes send_message, set_nickname, on_event, connect, disconnect — but client.rs has a fully implemented send_whisper() method that is not wired up in the JS-facing API. There is no comment or TODO explaining whether this is intentional (waiting for a future phase) or an oversight. A JS consumer who reads the NieClient doc comment listing event types including 'whisper_received' will reasonably expect a corresponding send_whisper() method. Fix: either expose send_whisper in NieClient with the same pattern as send_message, or add a comment on NieClient struct: // send_whisper is implemented in NieRelayClient but not yet exposed here — Phase N.
close_reason: duplicate of nie-7bv6.25: same missing send_whisper on NieClient; nie-7bv6.25 is the primary P1 bug report
